dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires identification of prior euphoric rally (>=10%) and pullback (>=5%) measured via returns. Capitulation modeled as high volume reversal (vol_ratio_20 spike) combined with elevated RSI (>=60th percentile as proxy for extreme sentiment). Sentiment percentile threshold approximated using RSI_14 >= 60. No structural support required per original rule. Exit uses +8% profit target and -4% stop loss. Hold period capped at 28 days (upper bound of 2-4 weeks).

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires identification of prior euphoric rally (>=10%) and pullback (>=5%) measured via returns. Capitulation modeled as high volume reversal (vol_ratio_20 spike) combined with elevated RSI (>=60th percentile as proxy for extreme sentiment). Sentiment percentile threshold approximated using RSI_14 >= 60. No structural support required per original rule. Exit uses +8% profit target and -4% stop loss. source_rule_text: Buy during the confusion and capitulation that follows an initial euphoric move, because the underlying macro catalyst (revolution, regime change) will ultimately support prices despite short-term reversal.
